title: limonium cambrense
intro: Limonium cambrense, also known as the Welsh sea lavender, is a flowering plant native to the UK and Ireland. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of limonene and other essential oils. The health benefits of Limonium cambrense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its essential oil can be used topically or in aromatherapy applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
